word: G3176 - μέγιστος - mégistos - meg'-is-tos - Exceeding great

sections.paragraph:
- Original: μέγιστος

- Transliteration: megistos

- Phonetic: meg'-is-tos

- Definition:

1. greatest, very great

- Origin: superlative of G3173

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: Superlative of G3173; greatest or very great: - exceeding great.
